name: clipforge-ai
description: ClipForge AI — turn long-form videos into viral-ready TikTok, Reels, and Shorts.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @clipforge/web" "npm run dev -w @clipforge/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @clipforge/api && npm run build -w @clipforge/web && npm run build -w @clipforge/bot
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @clipforge/web && npm run lint -w @clipforge/api
